downtimeDiagnoses.name: app-popunkoutersoftware
downtimeDiagnoses.likelyCause: No obvious infrastructure cause found — likely an application-level error (crash loop, bad startup config, or missing secrets)
downtimeDiagnoses.suggestedFix: Check Application Insights for exceptions or stream live logs at: https://app-popunkoutersoftware.scm.azurewebsites.net/api/logstream

downtimeDiagnoses.name: poredoimage-web
downtimeDiagnoses.likelyCause: Free-tier CPU/memory quota exceeded — app is suspended until the next quota cycle
